trans-unit.source: The target company must be different from the source company.
trans-unit.target: Der Zielmandant muss sich vom Quellmandant unterscheiden.

trans-unit.source: Define the drill-down page in the %1 field.
trans-unit.target: Definieren Sie die Drilldown-Seite im Feld %1.
trans-unit.note: Table ICM Data Transfer Table - NamedType DefineDrillDownPageMsg

trans-unit.source: This table is not included in the license. Active status cannot be set to true.
trans-unit.target: Diese Tabelle ist nicht in der Lizenz enthalten. Der Status „Aktiv“ kann nicht auf „true“ gesetzt werden.
trans-unit.note: Table ICM Data Transfer Table - NamedType Text001Lbl

trans-unit.source: Only tables with subtype "Normal" can be set to active.
trans-unit.target: Nur bei Tabelen mit dem Typ "Normal" kann das Feld Aktiv auf wahr gesetzt werden.

Codeunit ICM Data Transfer Management - NamedType Text001Lbl

trans-unit.source: The Field Active has been set to %1 for all filtered table lines.
trans-unit.target: Der „Aktiv“-Status wurde für alle gefilterten Tabellenzeilen auf %1 gesetzt.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit ICM Data Transfer Management - NamedType Text002Lbl
Codeunit ICM Data Transfer Management - NamedType Text003Lbl
Codeunit ICM Data Transfer Management - NamedType Text004Lbl

trans-unit.source: The list of Tables is being updated...\\
trans-unit.note: Codeunit ICM Data Transfer Management - NamedType Text005Lbl

trans-unit.source: The list of Tables is being copied...\\
trans-unit.note: Codeunit ICM Data Transfer Management - NamedType Text006Lbl

trans-unit.source: %1 table copied from Company %2 to Company %3.
trans-unit.target: %1 Tabellen von Mandant %2 zu Mandant %3 kopiert.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit ICM Data Transfer Management - NamedType Text007Lbl
Page ICM Data Transf. Pack. Filters - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the field caption of the field on which you want to filter records in the data transfer table.
trans-unit.target: Gibt die Feldbezeichnung des Felds an, für das Sie Datensätze filtern möchten.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transf. Pack. Filters - Control Field Caption - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the field filter value for a data transfer package filter. By setting a value, you specify that only records with that value are included in the data transfer package.
trans-unit.target: Gibt den Feldfilterwert für einen Datentransfer Paketfilter an. Durch das Setzen eines Werts legen Sie fest, dass nur Datensätze mit diesem Wert in das Datentransferpaket aufgenommen werden.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transf. Pack. Filters - Control Field Filter - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the ID of the field on which you want to filter records in the data transfer table.
trans-unit.target: Gibt die ID des Felds an, für das Sie Datensätze filtern möchten.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transf. Pack. Filters - Control Field ID - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the name of the field on which you want to filter records in the data transfer table.
trans-unit.target: Gibt den Namen des Felds an, für das Sie Datensätze filtern möchten.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transf. Pack. Filters - Control Field Name - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Data Transfer Pack. Fields - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the Caption of the field
trans-unit.target: Gibt die Beschreibung des Feldes an.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transfer Pack. Fields - Control ICM Field Caption - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Data Transfer Pack. Fields - Control ICM Field Caption - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the ID of the field for the table
trans-unit.target: Gibt die Nr. eines Tabellenfelds an.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transfer Pack. Fields - Control ICM Field ID - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Data Transfer Pack. Fields - Control ICM Field ID - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the Name of the field
trans-unit.target: Gibt den Namen des Felds an.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transfer Pack. Fields - Control ICM Field Name - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Data Transfer Pack. Fields - Control ICM Field Name - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether the field is included in the migration
trans-unit.target: Gibt an ob das Feld in der Datenübernahme enthalten ist.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transfer Pack. Fields - Control ICM Include Field - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Data Transfer Pack. Fields - Control ICM Include Field - Property Caption
Page ICM Data Transfer Pack. Fields - Control ICM Table ID - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Data Transfer Pack. Fields - Control ICM Table ID - Property Caption

Page ICM Data Transfer Pack. Fields - Action Clear Included - Property Caption
Page ICM Data Transfer Pack. Fields - Action Set Included - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Data Transfer Pack. Fields - Action Set Included - Property Caption

Page ICM Data Transfer Pack.Subform - Control ICM Target Comp. Record Count - Property Caption

Page ICM Data Transfer Pack.Subform - Control Table Caption - Property Caption
Page ICM Data Transfer Pack.Subform - Control Table ID - Property Caption
Page ICM Data Transfer Pack.Subform - Control Table Name - Property Caption
Page ICM Data Transfer Pack.Subform - Control Target Company Name - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: View the data that has been applied to the database.
trans-unit.target: Zeigt die Daten an, die auf die Datenbank angewendet wurden.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transfer Pack.Subform - Action DatabaseRecords - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Data Transfer Pack.Subform - Action DatabaseRecords - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: View or set field filter values for a configuration package filter. By setting a value, you specify that only records with that value are included in the configuration package.
trans-unit.target: Zeigt Feldfilterwerte für einen Datentransfer Paketfilter an oder legt diese fest. Durch das Setzen eines Werts legen Sie fest, dass nur Datensätze mit diesem Wert in das Datentransferpaket aufgenommen werden.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transfer Pack.Subform - Action PackageFilters - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Data Transfer Pack.Subform - Action PackageFilters - Property Caption
Page ICM Data Transfer Package Card - Property Caption
Page ICM Data Transfer Package Card - Control General - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the code of the data transfer package.
trans-unit.target: Gibt den Code des Datentransfer Pakets an.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transfer Package Card - Control Code - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Data Transfer Package Card - Control Code - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the description of the data transfer package.
trans-unit.target: Gibt die Beschreibung des Datentransfer Dakets an.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transfer Package Card - Control Description - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Data Transfer Package Card - Control Description - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the No. of Tables for the data transfer package.
trans-unit.target: Gibt die Anzahl der Tabellen an die im Datentransfer Paket enthalten sind.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transfer Package Card - Control No. of Tables - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Data Transfer Package Card - Control No. of Tables - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the source company for the data transfer package.
trans-unit.target: Gibt den Quellmandant für das Datentransfer Paket an.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transfer Package Card - Control Source Company Name - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Data Transfer Package Card - Control Source Company Name - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the target company for the data transfer package.
trans-unit.target: Gibt den Zielmandant für das Datentransfer Paket an.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transfer Package Card - Control Target Company Name - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Data Transfer Package Card - Control Target Company Name - Property Caption
Page ICM Data Transfer Package Card - Action Data Transfer Packages - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Data Transfer Package Card - Action Data Transfer Packages - Property Caption
Page ICM Data Transfer Package Card - Action Transfer Data Log - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Data Transfer Package Card - Action Transfer Data Log - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Copy an existing data transfer package to create a new package based on the same content.
trans-unit.target: Kopiert ein vorhandenes Datentransfer Paket, um ein neues Paket auf Grundlage desselben Inhalts zu erstellen.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transfer Package Card - Action CopyConfigPackage - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Data Transfer Package Card - Action CopyConfigPackage - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Transfer data between clients for all tables where the “Active” field has been checked
trans-unit.target: Daten zwischen Mandanten übertragen, bei allen Tabellen wo das Feld Aktiv markiert wurde

Page ICM Data Transfer Tables List - NamedType Text002Lbl

trans-unit.source: Specifies if the table information is active.
trans-unit.target: Gibt an, ob die Tabelleninformation aktiv ist.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transfer Tables List - Control Active - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the name of the company.
trans-unit.target: Gibt den Namen des Mandanten an.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transfer Tables List - Control Company Name - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies if the table has data per company.
trans-unit.target: Gibt an, ob die Tabelle Daten pro Mandant hat.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transfer Tables List - Control Data Per Company - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies if the table contains records.
trans-unit.target: Gibt an, ob die Tabelle Datensätze enthält.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transfer Tables List - Control Has Records - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the subtype of the table.
trans-unit.target: Gibt die Tabellenunterart der Tabelle an.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transfer Tables List - Control ICM Apply Table Fields - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies if the Records has been transferred.
trans-unit.target: Gibt an ob Datensätze übertragen wurden.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transfer Tables List - Control ICM Records transferred - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the unique identifier of the table.
trans-unit.target: Gibt die eindeutige Kennung der Tabelle an.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transfer Tables List - Control ID - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies if the table is included in the license.
trans-unit.target: Gibt an, ob die Tabelle in der Lizenz enthalten ist.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transfer Tables List - Control Included in the License - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the name of the table.
trans-unit.target: Gibt den Namen der Tabelle an.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transfer Tables List - Control Name - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of fields available for migration.
trans-unit.target: Gibt die Anzahl der verfügbaren Felder für die Migration an.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transfer Tables List - Control No. of Fields Available - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of fields included for migration.
trans-unit.target: Gibt die Anzahl der eingeschlossenen Felder für die Migration an.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transfer Tables List - Control No. of Fields Included - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of records in the table.
trans-unit.target: Gibt die Anzahl der Datensätze in der Tabelle an.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transfer Tables List - Control Record Count - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the caption of the table.
trans-unit.target: Gibt die Beschreibung der Tabelle an.

trans-unit.source: Specifies the subtype of the table.
trans-unit.target: Gibt die Tabellenunterart der Tabelle an.

trans-unit.source: Specifies the name of a the company.

trans-unit.source: Set Field Active to true or false

trans-unit.target: Daten zwischen Mandanten übertragen, bei allen Tabellen wo das Feld Aktiv markiert wurde

Page ICM Data Transfer Tables List - Action Transfer Data - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Fill the page with information about all available tables and update any changed data
trans-unit.target: Füllt die Seite mit Informationen zu allen verfügbaren Tabellen und ergänzt geänderte Daten.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Data Transfer Tables List - Action Update tables - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Data Transfer Tables List - Action Update tables - Property Caption

Page ICM Transfer Data Log List - Control ICM Entry No. - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies if a filter was applied during the transfer.
trans-unit.target: Gibt an welche Filter angewendet werden, während des Übertragens.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Transfer Data Log List - Control ICM Filter Exists - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Transfer Data Log List - Control ICM Filter Exists - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies Filter if was applied during the transfer.

trans-unit.note: Page ICM Transfer Data Log List - Control ICM Filter Text - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Transfer Data Log List - Control ICM Filter Text - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies Package Code if was applied during the transfer.
trans-unit.target: Gibt an welcher Paketcode während des Übertragens der Daten verwendet wurde.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Transfer Data Log List - Control ICM Package Code - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Transfer Data Log List - Control ICM Package Code - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of records available in the source table.
trans-unit.target: Gibt die Anzahl der Datensätze an die im Quellmandanten vorhanden sind.

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of records Skipped.

Page ICM Transfer Data Log List - Control ICM Transferred By - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date and time when the records were transferred.

Page ICM Transfer Data Log List - Control ICM Transferred Date - Property Caption

Report ICM Copy Config Package - Property Caption
Report ICM Copy Config Package - NamedType PackageAlreadyExistsErr

trans-unit.source: The target company must be different from the source company.
trans-unit.target: Der Zielmandant muss sich vom Quellmandant unterscheiden.
trans-unit.note: Report ICM Copy Config Package - NamedType Text001Err
Report ICM Copy Config Package - Control GroupName - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: The company to copy data from
trans-unit.target: Der Mandant, aus dem Daten kopiert werden sollen
trans-unit.note: Report ICM Copy Config Package - Control FromCompany - Property ToolTip
Report ICM Copy Config Package - Control FromCompany - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the code that the new configuration package gets after copying.
trans-unit.target: Legt den Code fest, den das neue Konfigurationspaket nach dem Kopieren erhält.
trans-unit.note: Report ICM Copy Config Package - Control Package - Property ToolTip
Report ICM Copy Config Package - Control Package - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: The company to copy data to
trans-unit.target: Der Mandant, in den Daten kopiert werden sollen
trans-unit.note: Report ICM Copy Config Package - Control ToCompany - Property ToolTip
Report ICM Copy Config Package - Control ToCompany - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Copies records from a source Company to a target Company
trans-unit.target: Kopiert Datensätze von einen Quellmandant zu einem Zielmandanten
trans-unit.note: Report ICM Copy Tables - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: The “Source Company” field must be filled.
trans-unit.note: Report ICM Copy Tables - NamedType Text001Err

trans-unit.source: The “Target Company” field must be filled.
trans-unit.note: Report ICM Copy Tables - NamedType Text002Err

trans-unit.source: The target company must be different from the source company.
trans-unit.target: Der Zielmandant muss sich vom Quellmandant unterscheiden.
trans-unit.note: Report ICM Copy Tables - NamedType Text003Err
Report ICM Copy Tables - Control Options - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: The company to copy data from
trans-unit.target: Der Mandant, aus dem Daten kopiert werden sollen
trans-unit.note: Report ICM Copy Tables - Control FromCompany - Property ToolTip
Report ICM Copy Tables - Control FromCompany - Property Caption
